patch_history.raw: Turret Can now be rotated while holding down ALT-FIRE. ACTIVATE now swaps its direction. Fixed a bug where its vision cone would disappear from the minimap if the player right-clicks. Nanoswarm Fixed a bug where an enemy’s Nanoswarm could remain invisible if you moved too quickly in and out of its detection range. Fixed a bug where an enemy’s Nanoswarm could remain invisible to you after she is suppressed. Fixed a bug where an enemy’s Nanoswarm would not reveal to you if you are in an Intangible state, like during Yoru’s Dimensional Drift or Reyna’s Dismiss Fixed a bug where its disabled effects sometimes wouldn’t play when she is suppressed. v

all_changes.context_label: Can now be rotated while holding down ALT-FIRE
all_changes.description: Can now be rotated while holding down ALT-FIRE

patch_history.raw: Fixed a bug where Killjoy’s neck and hair clip would shift inconsistently while moving with an Odin equipped. v

Alarmbot Fixed a bug where the minimap icons would occasionally disappear when deactivated outside their active ranges. Fixed inaccurate hit detection while it is jumping Turret Fixed a bug where the minimap icons would occasionally disappear when deactivated outside their active ranges. v
Lockdown Fixed a bug that caused Detain visual effects to show through thin walls and doors. v

Turret Cooldown when destroyed increased from 45s >>> 60s Reactivation time for turret increased from 0.5s >>> 2s Movement tagging per bullet increased 29.5% >>> 50% Added a “windup” effect when Killjoy first re-enters the activation range Alarmbot Health decreased from 50 >>> 20 Reactivation time increased from 1s >>> 2s Added a “windup” effect when Killjoy first re-enters the activation range v

patch_history.raw: Turret Fixed an issue where Iso’s Undercut would suppress Killjoy’s Turret and cause it to become inactive if hit directly without hitting Killjoy. v
Lockdown Detain pulse delay: 0.5s >>> 0.15s Lockdown’s visual effects have been updated to match this new behavior v

all_changes.context_label: Lockdown Detain pulse delay

patch_history.raw: Lockdown Swiftplay only: Starting points 2 >>> 3 v

all_changes.context_label: Lockdown Swiftplay only: Starting points

patch_history.raw: Fixed an issue where Killjoy’s recall minimap indicator could get stuck in a state where it was invisible. Alarmbot Alarmbot logic has been updated to be more intelligent. In niche circumstances, the Alarmbot will now path towards players if they are on ledges and explode on them if they would be hit by the size of the explosion rather than trying to run extremely long paths around the map. Undocumented Team Deathmatch only: Lockdown Cost increased 80 >>> 90 Game file data further indicates this could possibly be a bug v

numeric_changes.context_label: paths around the map. Undocumented Team Deathmatch only: Lockdown Cost increased

all_changes.context_label: paths around the map. Undocumented Team Deathmatch only: Lockdown Cost increased

patch_history.raw: Alarmbot Fixed a bug where it did not play the proper reactivation ceremony and would instantly reactivate when Killjoy reentered its range. v
Turret Fixed a bug where the deactivation range would not display on the minimap after switching between Turret and other abilities or weapons v

Turret Vision radius reduced 180 degrees >>> 100 degrees Added a representation of the Turret’s vision cone on Killjoy’s minimap when she is placing the Turret. Added VFX and updated the Turret’s animations to communicate the Turret’s new vision radius. v

all_changes.context_label: Turret Vision radius reduced
Added a representation of the Turret’s vision cone on Killjoy’s minimap when she is placing the Turr
all_changes.description: Added a representation of the Turret’s vision cone on Killjoy’s minimap when she is placing the Turr

all_changes.context_label: Added VFX and updated the Turret’s animations to communicate the Turret’s new vision radius

patch_history.raw: Lockdown Ultimate points increased 8 >>> 9 v

all_changes.context_label: Lockdown Ultimate points increased

patch_history.raw: Nanoswarm and Alarmbot Fixed bug with Killjoy’s utility not fading back into stealth when recovering from a disabled state v
Turret Fixed a bug that was causing her Turret to aim at the ground. v

Nanoswarm Nanoswarm reveal radius increased 350 >> 525 Nanoswarm audio has been updated. Audio loop now also turns off when disabled as a result of Killjoy being killed or suppressed. Improved feedback for the enemy when they destroy Nanoswarm. Nanoswarm is now revealed when it is disabled. Lockdown Updated visuals for when being destroyed. Removed the yellow warning UI Indicator for enemies Killjoy’s Lockdown. Turret and Alarmbot Updated deactivate sounds to make them more distinct. v

patch_history.raw: Turret Will no longer be disabled by KAY/O's if the pulse hit the turret without Killjoy also being hit Will no longer fire straight forward after firing at an enemy and then losing sight of them Fixed an issue where the turret would fire with no target when coming online if it was disabled while firing at a target v

patch_history.raw: Nanoswarm Fixed a bug where Nanoswarm would sometimes disappear from the minimap v
Voice lines relating to Alarmbot and Turret will now be heard globally by allies v
Improved the system used to place all of Killjoy's abilities at targeted ground locations v
Fixed a bug where Alarmbot and Turret were unretrievable after being resurrected by Sage v
Turret Bullet tagging reduced 72.5% slow >>> 29.5% slow v
Turret Fixed Turret not being affected by stuns v

Alarmbot Cooldown after pickup increased 7 >>> 20 seconds Nanoswarm Fixed a bug where picking up Nanoswarms during the buy phase would prevent you from purchasing a second charge Turret Cooldown after pickup increased 10 >>> 20 seconds v

patch_history.raw: Turret Fixed an issue where Killjoy’s turret could be placed underneath the ground in some maps v

Alarmbot Alarmbot now deactivates if Killjoy is more than 40m away from it. Reentering the 40m range reactivates the ability Range at which Alarmbot can be detected decreased from 9m >>> 7m Cooldown after pickup reduced from 20 seconds >>> 7 seconds Nanoswarm Range at which Nanoswarm can be detected decreased from 5m >>> 3.5m Damage increased from 40/s >>> 45/s Damage now ticks smoother and faster while in Nanoswarm, instead of in chunks of 10 every 1/4 of a second. Turret Turret now deactivates if Killjoy is more than 40m away from it. Reentering the 40m range reactivates the ability Cooldown after pickup reduced from 20 seconds >>> 10 seconds v
